description_long: This is a multi-story bakery building with a steeply pitched gabled roof made of gray shingles and a prominent stone chimney emitting smoke. The facade is constructed from a combination of tan wood planks and stone bricks, with decorative wooden beams and window frames. The ground floor features a red-and-white striped awning above a large window, suggesting a storefront entrance, and a small market stall with potted plants and produce. Multiple windows with white shutters are symmetrically arranged on each floor, and there are small decorative plants and shrubs around the base. The side of the building includes a wooden sign bracket, possibly for hanging signage, and a small balcony or overhang. The overall design is reminiscent of a European medieval or Tudor-style commercial building, blending rustic charm with functional urban features.
description: A multi-story, Tudor-style bakery with a steep gray roof, stone chimney, red-and-white awning, and decorative wood and stone facade. The storefront features large windows, a market stall, and lush greenery.
description_view_0: Side view showing the striped awning, market stall, potted plants, and a wooden sign bracket; the roof and chimney are visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the symmetrical window arrangement, main entrance with awning, and decorative plants at the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the stone chimney, additional windows, and a small balcony or overhang.
description_view_3: Rear or angled view focusing on the gabled roof, upper windows, and the striped awning over the storefront.
attribute_storefront_signage: None. There is a wooden sign bracket on the side of the building, but no visible signage, text, or logos are present.
attribute_display_window_with_baked_good: None. The storefront window is large and prominent, but no baked goods or display items are visible through it.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A red-and-white striped fabric awning is present above the storefront window. There is no visible bakery branding, logos, or text on the awning.
attribute_outdoor_seating_area: None. There are potted plants and a small market stall, but no tables, chairs, or designated outdoor seating area are visible.
attribute_architectural_style: Tudor Revival with medieval European influences, characterized by steep gabled roofs, exposed wooden beams, stone masonry, and decorative window framing.
